mapper.select: SELECT h.*, p.name as pet_name FROM pet_health_record h LEFT JOIN pet_profile p ON h.pet_id = p.id WHERE h.pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY h.record_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_health_record (pet_id, record_date, height, weight, temperature, health_status, diagnosis, treatment, doctor, remark) VALUES (#{petId}, #{recordDate}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{temperature}, #{healthStatus}, #{diagnosis}, #{treatment}, #{doctor}, #{remark})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet_health_record h LEFT JOIN pet_profile p ON h.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
